description: Composition Red and white checked shirt, made of 100% cotton,  that has full length buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoend cuffs and with a mid-sleeve button, pocket on the left chest, and brand embroidery above the left pocket   Fitting Slim   Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Warm iron   Checks that add immense style to your casual look is what scullers brings into your life. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with formal pants, denims or corduroys and black footwear for stylish formal and casual looks.   Model statistics The model wears size M in shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
